scripts.sync:pages: cp index.html cf-pages-dist/index.html && cp styles.css cf-pages-dist/styles.css && cp app.js cf-pages-dist/app.js && cp artifact-viewer.js cf-pages-dist/artifact-viewer.js && cp artifact-source.txt cf-pages-dist/artifact-source.txt && cp favicon.ico cf-pages-dist/favicon.ico
scripts.deploy: npm run sync:pages && npx wrangler pages deploy cf-pages-dist
